LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.TakeOverControlTip: When enabled, Colony Manager Redux takes over deciding when to enable/disable sowing and harvesting, mod-wide, in place of Farming Hysteresis's own always-on control. Growers not covered by any Farming Hysteresis manager job are left uncontrolled while this is on.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.JobDormantTakeover: Inactive: Colony Manager Redux is not currently in control of Farming Hysteresis
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.All.Ti: Every eligible grower on the map not already claimed by another Farming Hysteresis job is managed by this job.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.Area.T: Only growers within (or outside, if inverted) a chosen area are managed by this job.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.Specif: Only the growers you explicitly select are managed by this job.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.NoElig: No eligible growers found on this map yet.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.GrowerScope.Manage: Already managed by another Farming Hysteresis job ({0}). A grower can only be controlled by one job at a time.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.TargetPlant.NoneAv: None of this job's managed growers can currently grow the same plant (e.g. mixing a hydroponics basin with an aquatic growing zone), so there's nothing to select. Narrow the grower scope to growers that share at least one growable plant.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.RotationMode.Round: The active crop keeps growing until its own upper bound is reached, then the rotation moves on to the next crop in the list, cycling. Reordering the list only changes where the cycle resumes next, not which crop is active right now.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.RotationMode.Prior: Every time the manager works this job, the active crop becomes whichever crop is first in the list that hasn't reached its own upper bound yet - crops already fully stocked are skipped over. Reordering the list changes priority immediately.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.RotationSwitchMode: When a crop's upper bound is reached and the rotation moves on to the next crop, any already-standing plants of the outgoing crop are left to mature and get harvested normally - nothing is destroyed, but the cells they occupy won't be sown with the new crop until they're naturally harvested.

When a crop's upper bound is reached and the rotation moves on to the next crop, any not-yet-ripe standing plants of the outgoing crop are immediately cut down (losing their eventual yield) so the new crop can be sown right away. Already-ripe plants are still harvested normally rather than wasted.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.CropRotation.Remov: Remove this crop from the rotation
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.CropRotation.Bound: Start {1} {0} when there are fewer than the lower bound in storage; once there are more than the upper bound, {2}.
the rotation moves on to the next crop
the crop stops growing until stock drops back below the lower bound
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.Trigger.NoTargetPl: No crop selected yet - add one in the "Crop rotation" section above to start gating sow/harvest.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.Trigger.FollowTarg: When enabled, this rotation entry tracks whatever it harvests from the crop it's set to grow, and switches automatically whenever that crop changes. Disable this to track something else entirely (e.g. sow Hops based on Beer stock, not Hops).
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.Trigger.FollowingT: Currently tracking whatever this entry's own crop produces. Disable "Follow crop" above to track something else instead.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.LatchModeDesc.Unkn: Unknown: The manager hasn't worked on this job yet.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.Migration.Title: Migrate Farming Hysteresis to Colony Manager Redux?
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.Migration.Prompt: Farming Hysteresis now defaults to being controlled through Colony Manager Redux instead of its own always-on sowing/harvesting toggle, and this save already has growers configured under the old system. Migrate them to Colony Manager Redux jobs now (grouped by target plant, using each group's most common bounds), or keep using the old system for now? You can migrate later from the farming hysteresis manager tab if you decline at this time.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.Migration.Migrated: Existing growers have been migrated to Colony Manager Redux jobs, grouped by target plant.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.Migration.Declined: Farming Hysteresis will keep using its old always-on control for this save. You can migrate to Colony Manager Redux at any time from the farming hysteresis manager tab.
LanguageData.FarmingHysteresis.CMR.Migration.PendingN: This save is still using Farming Hysteresis's old always-on control rather than Colony Manager Redux. Migrating now will create a job per target plant found among currently-enabled growers, using the most common bounds among each group.
